disclaimer: AI-generated probabilistic scenarios based on PTD Today publishing history. These are not guarantees, verified forecasts, investment advice, or engineering conclusions.

methodology.summary: Probabilities are transparent heuristics based on reconstructed article frequency, recent momentum, evidence volume, and confidence metadata.
limitations: Older articles may contain region metadata without explicit countries.
Historical PTD Today articles are AI-generated intelligence, not verified reporting.
Signal frequency does not equal real-world event probability.
Outlooks require validation using authoritative primary sources.
